title: 愛支犯眾怒！全球金主收水 WHO急求7億抗支那肺炎

replies.msg:
https://tinyurl.com/sahlskz



最新籌錢進度

因應武漢肺炎病毒肆虐，

世衛主席譚德塞要求世界各國共籌 6億7500萬美金 (US$ 675 Million)

其中6000萬美金為世衛對此次武漢肺炎的運作資金，

而其餘6億1500萬將投入遭病毒肆虐國家的救助。(目前中國有世界九成五病例)

同場加映：侵侵cut WHO budget

https://tinyurl.com/qm3benb

CHO 可能要失望了
剛剛看到CNN 的消息，川普要大砍CHO的預算， 節錄如下

The FY21 Budget Proposal, released today, outlines a nearly $65M proposed cut
to the World Health Organization – a more than 50% decrease from FY20 funding
.

簡單的說，
美國在下一個會計年度要給WHO的預算大砍50%，6千5百萬美金

It includes a proposed $115 million for Global Health Security aimed at enabli
ng “the U.S. government, in partnership with other nations, international org
anizations, and public and private stakeholders, to prevent avoidable epidemic
s, detect threats early, and respond rapidly and effectively to disease outbre
aks and other critical infectious disease threats (including anti-microbial re
sistance) in an effort to prevent them from becoming national or global emerge
ncies.”

大意就是，
同時要大量增加1億多美金的預算到全球衛生安全組織，讓美國政府能跟其他盟友對抗疾
病
